title: Immigration & Asylum Expert Witness | Psychology Direct
description: Psychological and psychiatric assessments for immigration tribunals and asylum claims. Torture, PTSD, and country-specific trauma.

blocks.headline: Win Your Asylum Case with Expert Trauma Evidence
blocks.subtitle: We match you with culturally competent psychologists and psychiatrists who understand asylum trauma, torture, and persecution. Court-ready reports in 4–6 weeks. Legal Aid rates always.

children.text: Psychologists assess trauma from persecution and torture. They diagnose PTSD, evaluate the credibility of your client's account, and assess how the trauma affects their day-to-day functioning.
Functional impairment and impact on asylum claim
Psychiatrists provide expert medical opinion on mental health conditions from persecution and torture. They diagnose based on international criteria, establish causation, and recommend treatment.

Asylum work needs experts who understand trauma psychology and the persecution contexts your clients face. Our network includes specialists in asylum trauma, torture assessment, and regional cultural competency. When you brief us, your Client Manager will find an expert familiar with your client's country and trauma context.
Not sure which type of expert you need? Try our Psychologist or Psychiatrist? tool → /tools/psychologist-or-psychiatrist/

steps.title: Provide Case Context
steps.description: Call us on 01306 879 975. Tell us your client's country, persecution history, and mental health needs. Share any cultural context that will help with expert matching.

steps.title: Receive Specialist CVs
steps.description: Within 24 hours, we send 2–3 CVs from psychologists/psychiatrists with expertise in your client's country or region. All accept Legal Aid rates.

steps.title: Instruct & We Handle Everything
steps.description: We arrange appointments (in-person or remote), coordinate with interpreters, and manage all logistics.

steps.title: Tribunal-Ready Report
steps.description: You get a comprehensive, trauma-informed report that's 100% quality-checked. Standard turnaround is 4–6 weeks. Fast-track available.

faqs.question: What psychological conditions are common in asylum claimants?
faqs.answer: PTSD, complex PTSD, depression, anxiety, and adjustment disorders are common. Some experience psychotic symptoms following severe trauma. Expert assessment links the diagnosis to your client's specific persecution history.

faqs.question: How do experts assess torture?
faqs.answer: Experts use validated torture assessment protocols, detailed history-taking, and psychological testing. They examine consistency of accounts, physical and psychological effects, and the impact on your client's functioning.

faqs.question: Do I need a psychologist or a psychiatrist?
faqs.answer: A psychologist is usually enough for trauma and PTSD assessment. Add a psychiatrist when medication, medical issues, or medical diagnosis opinion matters. Many cases benefit from both.

faqs.question: Do your experts have country-specific expertise?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have experts with knowledge of asylum trauma, persecution patterns, and cultural contexts across regions. During matching, we'll prioritize experts with relevant regional knowledge for your client's country.

faqs.question: Can assessments be done through an interpreter?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many of your clients need interpreter support, and we arrange it. Our experts are experienced in trauma assessment through interpreters, and assessment quality is maintained with professional interpretation.

faqs.question: How long does a tribunal-ready report take?
faqs.answer: Standard turnaround is 4–6 weeks. For urgent cases with tribunal deadlines, we offer fast-track services. Call us on 01306 879 975 to discuss your timeline.

faqs.question: Will the expert attend the tribunal?
faqs.answer: Your report stands alone for tribunal purposes. If you need the expert to attend and give evidence, we can arrange that separately. Discuss this with your Client Manager.

blocks.heading: Ready to Strengthen Your Asylum Case?
blocks.bodyText: We'll match you with a trauma-informed expert who understands your client's country and culture. We handle matching, appointments, interpreters, and delivery.
